title: senecio subulatus var. salsus
intro: Senecio subulatus var. salsus, also known as the "Blue Spurred Senecio" or "Blue Spurred Ragwort," is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant contains sesquiterpene lactones, which exhibit medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Senecio subulatus var. salsus include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant is typically prepared as a tincture or infused in oil for herbal remedies, although its use should be cautioned due to potential toxicity and interactions with other medications.
